subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Ali! Bear witness even as God Himself hath testified that there is none other God but Him Who hath appeared in truth. Verily He is the Promised One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی اشهد بما شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو الذی ظهر بالحق انه هو الموعود
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @living waters; water of life
